Our Story

India's Most Trusted
Farm-to-Globe Exporter

Rocky Global Produce bridges the fertile farms of Madhya Pradesh with international buyers who demand consistency, quality, and absolute reliability. Our vertically integrated model — from farm gate to container loading — ensures every shipment represents the absolute best of Indian agriculture.

Operating from Khargone's rich agricultural belt, we source directly from 50+ contracted farmers, apply rigorous phytosanitary checks, and manage cold-chain logistics end-to-end, serving buyers across UAE, Gulf, and Asia.

APEDA APEDA/MP/2025/0472
IEC IEC0425MP4718
GSTIN 23ABCPR7419K1ZM

Farm-Direct Sourcing
No middlemen. Direct contracts with 50+ farmers for traceable, consistent supply.
02
Cold Chain Integrity
8°C–12°C reefer containers from harvest through Jebel Ali port delivery.
03
Global Compliance
APEDA, FSSAI, ISO 22000:2018 & phytosanitary certified operations.
04
Custom Branding
White-label & buyer-specific packaging, pouch packs, net bags, tray packs.

Premium Export Produce

Straight from Madhya Pradesh to Your Shelf

Every batch is farm-sourced, carefully graded against APEDA Export Grade A standards, and dispatched via refrigerated cold-chain logistics. Our produce arrives at Jebel Ali, Dubai ready for immediate retail distribution.

Temperature management at 8°C–12°C ensures peak freshness from Nhava Sheva (JNPT), Mumbai to destination port — matching the quality expectations of UAE's premium supermarket chains and institutional buyers.

View FOB Pricing
Export Pricing

FOB Price Reference

Product Grade Packing Min. Order Monthly Supply FOB Price (USD/MT)
Red Diamond Guava Export Grade A 5kg Corrugated Box 10–25 MT 50 MT/mo $850 / MT
VNR Guava Export Grade A 5kg Corrugated Box 10–25 MT 40 MT/mo $820 / MT
Fresh Red Onion Export Grade A 25kg Mesh Bag 20–50 MT 100 MT/mo $420 / MT
Fresh Ginger Root Export Grade A 20kg Mesh Bag 10–30 MT 50 MT/mo $680 / MT
Fresh Garlic Export Grade A 10kg Net Bag 10–25 MT 60 MT/mo $750 / MT

All prices are FOB Nhava Sheva (JNPT), Mumbai. Payment terms: 30% advance, 70% against Bill of Lading. Prices subject to seasonal variation. Port of discharge: Jebel Ali, Dubai, UAE.

Export Packaging

Designed for Global Retail Standards

Our export packaging meets international retail requirements with food-safe corrugated carton boxes, precise weight specifications (5kg and 10kg), clear product information, and handling instructions compliant with UAE and Gulf import standards.

Our Process

Farm to Global Doorstep — 5 Steps

01
Farm Selection
Contracted farms in Khargone district, vetted for soil quality, water purity, and certified farming practices.
02
Quality Grading
Expert sorters grade every batch by size, brix level, firmness & appearance against APEDA Export Grade A specs.
03
Custom Packaging
Branded corrugated boxes, custom labelling & buyer-specific SKU configurations for retail-ready export.
04
Certification
Phytosanitary inspection, APEDA documentation, certificate of origin & full customs compliance managed in-house.
05
Cold-Chain Delivery
20ft reefer container at 8°C–12°C from Nhava Sheva (JNPT) to Jebel Ali, Dubai — 8–10 days transit.
Why Rocky

Why Global Buyers Choose Us

We ensure premium quality, transparent processes, and reliable delivery every time — because your supply chain reputation depends on ours.

Direct Farm Sourcing
50+ contracted farms — no middlemen. Full traceability from soil to container.
Cold Chain Logistics
8°C–12°C reefer containers from farm gate to Jebel Ali port — freshness guaranteed.
Full Documentation
Commercial invoice, packing list, BL, phytosanitary cert, CoO & APEDA cert — all handled.
Custom Branding
White-label packaging — carton box, pouch pack, net bag, or tray pack per buyer specs.
Flexible Payment Terms
30% advance, 70% against Bill of Lading — structured for long-term buyer partnerships.
Year-Round Supply
Minimum 20 MT/month during peak season; contracted supply prevents gaps.

"Rocky Global Produce delivers consistency in every shipment — exactly what international buyers need to build premium retail relationships."

— Al Noor Fresh Foods Trading LLC, Dubai UAE

Compliance & Trust

Our Certifications

APEDA
APEDA Registered
Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority — Government of India certified exporter.
Reg: APEDA/MP/2025/0472
FSSAI
FSSAI Licensed
Food Safety and Standards Authority of India certified. Full compliance with national food safety norms.
Lic: 11225999001234
ISO
ISO 22000:2018
International food safety management system certification ensuring global quality compliance at all levels.
Food Safety Management
PHS
Phytosanitary Cert.
All shipments carry phytosanitary certificates. Zero border rejection on documentation — UAE customs approved.
